title: FP Digest writer hallucinates 'thin news day' briefing on empty plan
description: When the editor returns an empty plan (themes=[], directives=[]), the Rundown writer correctly refuses with 'This episode cannot be generated...', but the FP Digest writer fabricates a full briefing from memory of prior episodes — including specific claims about Ukraine, Venezuela, Iran, Sudan, Lebanon, and Balochistan that were not in today's input. Discovered 2026-05-26 when gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview deprecation caused empty plans across the board (fixed in commit 493bb10). FP writer should match Rundown's empty-plan refusal behavior — compare pipeline/fp_writer.py and pipeline/rundown_writer.py prompts, and add an empty-plan guard at the writer boundary before calling opencode-serve.
